title: OpenAI Founded
description: Sam Altman, Elon Musk, Greg Brockman, Ilya Sutskever, and others announce OpenAI with $1B in pledged funding. Mission: to advance digital intelligence for humanity's benefit.

title: OpenAI Gym Released
description: OpenAI releases Gym, a toolkit for developing and comparing reinforcement learning algorithms. Becomes standard benchmark for RL research.

title: Universe Platform
description: OpenAI Universe released — software platform for measuring and training AI using games, websites, and applications.

title: World Models Paper
description: OpenAI publishes influential research on World Models, showing agents can learn in imagined environments.

title: Dota 2 Bot
description: OpenAI bot defeats top Dota 2 players at The International, demonstrating emergent teamwork in competitive games.

title: Elon Musk Departs
description: Elon Musk leaves OpenAI board citing potential future conflicts with Tesla's AI development.

title: GPT-1 Released
description: OpenAI publishes 'Improving Language Understanding by Generative Pre-Training' — GPT-1 with 117M parameters introduces unsupervised pre-training + fine-tuning paradigm.

title: GPT-2 Released (Partial)
description: OpenAI releases GPT-2 (1.5B parameters) in staged rollout citing potential misuse concerns. Generates global debate on responsible AI release.

title: OpenAI LP Founded
description: OpenAI transitions from non-profit to 'capped-profit' model (OpenAI LP) to attract capital for AGI development. Profit cap set at 100x investment.

title: Microsoft Invests $1B
description: Microsoft announces $1 billion investment in OpenAI, becoming exclusive cloud provider and integrating OpenAI tech into Azure.

title: Rubik's Cube Solved by Robot
description: OpenAI demonstrates robotic hand solving Rubik's Cube using reinforcement learning — breakthrough in dexterous manipulation.

title: GPT-3 Released
description: GPT-3 (175B parameters) released via API. Demonstrates emergent few-shot learning capabilities. Hailed as landmark in NLP and sparks widespread commercial interest.

title: GPT-3 Licensed Exclusively to Microsoft
description: Microsoft obtains exclusive license to GPT-3 source code while OpenAI retains API access rights.

title: DALL-E Announced
description: OpenAI introduces DALL-E, a 12B parameter model that generates images from text descriptions. Demonstrates surprising compositional abilities.

title: CLIP Released
description: CLIP (Contrastive Language-Image Pre-training) released — learns visual concepts from natural language supervision. Foundation for many multimodal systems.

title: Codex Announced
description: OpenAI introduces Codex, GPT model fine-tuned on code. Powers GitHub Copilot (launched with GitHub in June).

title: DALL-E 2 Released
description: DALL-E 2 launched with photorealistic image generation, outpainting, and variations. Waitlist system due to safety concerns.

title: GPT-3.5 Fine-Tuning API
description: OpenAI releases fine-tuning API for GPT-3.5, allowing developers to customize models for specific tasks.

title: ChatGPT Launched
description: ChatGPT released as research preview. Based on GPT-3.5 with RLHF. Becomes fastest-growing consumer app in history, reaching 100M users in 2 months.

title: Microsoft Invests $10B
description: Microsoft announces multi-year, multi-billion dollar investment (reported $10B) in OpenAI, extending partnership. Valuation reaches ~$29B.

title: Bing Chat Announced
description: Microsoft unveils Bing with ChatGPT integration, powered by GPT-4. Marks beginning of search engine AI wars with Google.

title: ChatGPT API Released
description: OpenAI releases ChatGPT API (gpt-3.5-turbo) at 10x cheaper price than text-davinci-003. Triggers explosion of AI-powered applications.

title: GPT-4 Released
description: GPT-4 launched with multimodal capabilities (text + images), 32K context option, and significantly improved reasoning. Powers ChatGPT Plus.

title: ChatGPT Plugins
description: OpenAI announces plugin system for ChatGPT, allowing integration with external services (Expedia, Instacart, Wolfram Alpha, etc.).

title: ChatGPT Mobile App
description: ChatGPT iOS app launched. Android follows in July. Brings conversational AI to mobile mainstream.

title: GPT-4 API General Availability
description: GPT-4 API made available to all paying customers, democratizing access to frontier model capabilities.

title: ChatGPT Gains Voice & Vision
description: ChatGPT updated with voice conversations and image understanding capabilities, making it truly multimodal.

title: GPT-4 Turbo & GPTs Store
description: At DevDay: GPT-4 Turbo (128K context, cheaper), GPTs (custom ChatGPT versions), and Assistants API announced. Sam Altman returns to spotlight after board drama.

title: Sam Altman Fired by Board
description: OpenAI board unexpectedly fires CEO Sam Altman. Greg Brockman resigns. 700+ employees threaten to quit. Microsoft hires Altman. Altman reinstated after 5 days of chaos.

title: Altman Reinstated as CEO
description: Sam Altman returns as CEO with new initial board. Microsoft gains non-voting observer seat. Board restructuring continues.

title: Sora Announced
description: OpenAI unveils Sora, a text-to-video model capable of generating 60-second realistic videos. Stuns creative industries and raises deepfake concerns.

title: Elon Musk Sues OpenAI
description: Elon Musk files lawsuit against OpenAI, alleging breach of founding agreement by prioritizing profit over humanity's benefit. Later withdraws and refiles.

title: GPT-4o Released
description: GPT-4o ('omni') launched — native multimodal model processing text, audio, and vision in single architecture. 2x faster, 50% cheaper than GPT-4 Turbo.

title: Apple Integrates ChatGPT
description: Apple announces ChatGPT integration into iOS 18, iPadOS 18, and macOS Sequoia as part of Apple Intelligence. Siri can delegate to ChatGPT.

title: GPT-4o Mini Released
description: GPT-4o mini launched as cost-efficient small model. Priced at 15¢/1M input tokens, outperforming GPT-3.5 at fraction of cost.

title: o1 Preview Released
description: OpenAI introduces o1-preview and o1-mini — first 'reasoning' models using chain-of-thought. Excels at math, coding, and scientific reasoning. Trades speed for accuracy.

title: OpenAI Closes $6.6B Funding
description: OpenAI raises $6.6 billion at $157 billion valuation. Thrive Capital leads, Microsoft, NVIDIA, SoftBank participate. Becomes one of most valuable private companies.

title: ChatGPT Search Launched
description: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Search, directly competing with Google and Perplexity. Provides real-time web search with conversational interface.

title: Sora Public Launch
description: Sora made available to ChatGPT Plus/Pro users after 9-month waitlist period. Generates up to 1080p 20-second videos.

title: o1 Full Released
description: o1 full version launched with improved reasoning, vision capabilities, and function calling. o1 Pro mode introduced for ChatGPT Pro subscribers.

title: o3 Preview Announced
description: OpenAI announces o3 and o3-mini preview models. o3 achieves breakthrough scores on ARC-AGI benchmark (87.5%). Not yet publicly available.

title: Stargate Project Announced
description: Trump, Altman, and Oracle's Larry Ellison announce $500B Stargate Project for US AI infrastructure. OpenAI is primary technology partner.

title: Operator Agent Released
description: OpenAI launches Operator, an AI agent that can autonomously use computers to browse websites, fill forms, and complete tasks via CUA (Computer Using Agent).

title: o3-mini Released
description: o3-mini launched as cost-efficient reasoning model. Offers adjustable reasoning effort (low/medium/high). Competitive with o1 at fraction of cost.

title: DeepResearch Released
description: OpenAI launches DeepResearch agent capable of autonomous multi-step research, synthesizing information from hundreds of sources in minutes.

title: o3 Full Released
description: o3 full version launched. Currently the strongest reasoning model with major improvements in coding, math, and scientific reasoning. Available via API.

title: OpenAI Moves to For-Profit
description: OpenAI announces restructuring plan to remove non-profit control, transitioning to public benefit corporation. Faced regulatory scrutiny and Elon Musk opposition.

title: GPT-4.1 Released
description: GPT-4.1 launched with improved instruction following, coding, and long-context performance (1M tokens). Significant price reductions compared to GPT-4o.

title: OpenAI Acquires io
description: OpenAI acquires AI hardware startup io (founded by Jony Ive, former Apple designer) for $6.5B. Aims to build AI-native devices.

title: OpenAI Acquires Windsurf
description: OpenAI acquires Windsurf (formerly Codeium) AI coding IDE for approximately $3B. Integrates into AI coding product line.

title: GPT-5 Released
description: OpenAI releases GPT-5 with unified architecture replacing separate GPT-4o and o-series models. Claims 'tremendous leap' in capabilities but faces mixed reviews and controversy over safety evaluation.
